pages.title: Seed Analyzer
pages.text: Equip it in the $(bold)head slot$(), then hover over a gene seed to read its hidden data.$(br2)It only changes seed item tooltips and does not provide a machine HUD. Open each machine GUI to inspect machine state.

pages.title: Crafting
pages.text: Requires iron nuggets, a glass pane, silicon shards, and rare earth dust. The monocle is crafted only and is not added to chest loot.

pages.title: Readable Data
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Speed$(): cultivation speed.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Yield$(): mature output count.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Potency$(): output quality.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Generation$(): breeding generation.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Synergy$(): processing synergy bonus.$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mutation$(): value breakthrough or synergy mutation details.
